panel.title: Security Enabled Global Group Members Added

search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ( EventCode=632 OR EventCode=4728) | eval caller = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,0), Caller_User_Name, SubjectUserName) | eval member = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1), Member_Name, MemberName) | eval group = coalesce(Target_Account_Name, Group_Name, TargetUserName) | search caller="$ActionByGlobal$" group="$GlobalGroup$" member="$UsernameGlobal$" | table _time caller member group | rename _time AS Time member AS Username group AS Group caller AS "Action by" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)

panel.title: Security Enabled Universal Group Members Added

search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ( EventCode=660 OR EventCode=4756 ) | eval caller = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,0), Caller_User_Name, SubjectUserName) | eval member = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1), Member_Name, MemberName) | eval group = coalesce(Target_Account_Name, Group_Name, TargetUserName) | search caller="$ActionByUniversal$" group="$UniversalGroup$" member="$UsernameUniversal$" | table _time caller member group | rename _time AS Time member AS Username group AS Group caller AS "Action by" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)

panel.title: Security Enabled Local Group Members Added

search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ( EventCode=636 OR EventCode=4732 ) | eval Member_Name = if(Member_Name == "-", Member_ID, Member_Name) | eval caller = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,0), Caller_User_Name, SubjectUserName) | eval member = coalesce(mvindex(Account_Name,1), Member_Name, MemberName) | eval group = coalesce(Target_Account_Name, Group_Name, TargetUserName) | eval domain = if(dest_nt_domain == "Builtin", ComputerName, dest_nt_domain) | search caller="$ActionByLocal$" group="$LocalGroup$" member="$UsernameLocal$" domain="$DestinationLocal$"| table _time caller member group domain | rename _time AS Time member AS Username group AS Group caller AS "Action by" domain AS "Destination domain/server" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` EventCode=631 OR EventCode=4727 OR EventCode=635 OR EventCode=4731 OR EventCode=658 OR EventCode=4754 | eval new_grp = coalesce(Group_Name, New_Account_Name, TargetUserName, Target_Account_Name) | eval creator = coalesce(Account_Name, Caller_User_Name, SubjectUserName) | search creator="$CreatedBy$" new_grp="$CreatedGroup$" | table _time creator new_grp | rename _time AS Time creator AS "Group created by" new_grp AS "Created group" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` EventCode=662 OR EventCode=4758 OR EventCode=638 OR EventCode=4734 OR EventCode=634 OR EventCode=4730 | eval del_grp = coalesce(Group_Name, Target_Account_Name,TargetUserName) | eval deletedby = coalesce(Account_Name, Caller_User_Name, SubjectUserName) | search deletedby="$DeletedBy$" del_grp="$DeletedGroup$" | table _time deletedby del_grp | rename _time AS Time deletedby AS "Group deleted by" del_grp AS "Deleted group" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)
